[{'text': "The robot is at (9.05, 11.72) and the front has 1.63m clear. The green destination is above and to the right. The robot appears to be at the boundary of the black wall. 

Looking at the map: the destination (green) is at approximately (11.51, 13.67). I'm at (9.05, 11.72). I need to go northeast — more east (+2.46m) and more north (+1.95m). 

The front is clear (east). Let me continue east.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01TbUm9dDzk9Ga8k5eGEMPWb', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
